div.p: Two function-shaped boxes, side by side or stacked:

ul.li: netqasm.local_routine @subrt(%q: i32, %n: i32, %e: i32) -> i1 with a tiny op list inside (netqasm.rot_x, netqasm.hadamard, netqasm.measure, netqasm.return).
netqasm.request_routine @epr(%q: i32) -> i1 with netqasm.eprs_measure %q, @Bob, netqasm.return.

div.p: Highlight that arguments and locals are i32 qubit pointers, and that classical results bubble out via netqasm.return. Show an arrow from a qoalahost.call in the host body (a small inset) into the routine.
